title: Grey Ridge — Base On-Chain Data Proxy
description: Query Base mainnet on-chain data. Supports ETH balance, ERC-20 token balance, gas price, and block number lookups. All results are stored in the Actor's dataset for easy export.

wallets.title: Wallet Addresses
wallets.description: Base mainnet wallet addresses (0x-prefixed) to query balances for. Each address gets ETH balance and optional ERC-20 token balances.

tokens.title: Token Addresses (ERC-20)
tokens.description: Base mainnet ERC-20 token contract addresses to check balances for each wallet. Leave empty to only get native ETH balances. Standard tokens: USDC = 0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913, WETH = 0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000006

includeGasPrice.title: Include gas price
includeGasPrice.description: If enabled, fetches current Base mainnet gas price (wei, gwei, and USD equivalent) alongside other queries.

includeBlockNumber.title: Include block number
includeBlockNumber.description: If enabled, fetches latest Base mainnet block number alongside other queries.

performTokenSecurityCheck.title: Perform token security check
performTokenSecurityCheck.description: If enabled, runs a honeypot/safety scan on each token contract via the x402 /chain/token-security endpoint (paid: $0.02/token). Adds 50+ ms latency per token. Requires a keyed proxy, not the free RPC path.
